creator: remko@elvandar.org
text:
On Mon, June 4, 2007 12:09 am, Charles A. Landemaine wrote:
> On 6/3/07, Mark Linimon <linimon@lonesome.com> wrote:
>> Think in terms of rack-mounted machines.  This has been dicussed before,
>> without a consensus being reached.
>
> But rack-mounted machines are accessible through terminal, and I don't
> see a benefit having a beep, be it on a server without monitor, or on
> a desktop.
>

You dont, others do, no consensus being reached, no need for a PR. Try to
reach a concensus first and then contact me to reopen the ticket please,
thanks!

Cheers
remko
-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
